Title: Homepage — Load and Hero Navigation
Preconditions: Fresh browser session; {{FRONT_URL}} accessible
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}
[WAIT] hero banner visible above the fold
[ASSERT] page title contains site name
[ACT] click hero banner primary CTA
[WAIT] target page loads without 404
[ACT] click browser back
[WAIT] homepage reloads
Assertions:
[DOM] hero banner section visible above the fold
[DOM] 'Popular categories' section visible with ≥1 category tile
[DOM] navigation bar visible with 'All products' dropdown button
[DOM] language selector visible in top header
[DOM] cart icon accessible in main nav icon bar
[NAV] hero CTA navigates to a category or catalog page (not 404)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no JS errors on homepage load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on initial page load
[NETWORK] no failed GraphQL requests on homepage render
Failure_Signals: Homepage blank or spinner stuck >10s (BL-CROSS-011); hero banner absent; JS TypeError on load; 4xx on homepage GraphQL queries
Cleanup: none

Title: Registration — Personal Account
Preconditions: Fresh browser; {{FRONT_URL}} accessible
Test_Data: front_url={{FRONT_URL}}, reg_email=random (AGENT-TEST- prefix, generated at runtime)
Steps:
[SETUP] generate unique email: AGENT-TEST-smk002-{unix_ms}@test.com — store as reg_email
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/sign-up
[WAIT] account type selector visible
[ACT] select 'Personal' account type
[ACT] fill 'First Name': 'Test', 'Last Name': 'User', 'Email': reg_email, 'Password': {{USER_PASSWORD}}
[ACT] check 'I agree to the Terms and Conditions'
[ACT] click 'Create Account'
[WAIT] redirect to homepage or confirmation message
Assertions:
[DOM] confirmation message shown or user redirected to authenticated homepage
[DOM] user name visible in header after redirect
[STATE] login with new credentials succeeds on retry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /connect/token returns 200 with access_token after registration
[ADMIN] user visible under Customers in admin panel
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during form submit
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on account creation request
Failure_Signals: Validation error on valid email format; form stays on same page with no feedback; 400/500 on account create API; spinner stuck >5s
Cleanup: Delete test account via admin after test (AGENT-TEST- prefix identifies it)

Title: Add to Cart — Single Product from PDP (B2B Stepper)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Product @td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.slug) in stock
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.slug)
[WAIT] PDP loaded; 'Increase quantity' (+) stepper visible (B2B-store: stepper IS the add-to-cart entry point)
[ASSERT] spinbutton shows '0'; 'Decrease quantity' button disabled (BL-CART-001)
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' (+) once
[WAIT] spinbutton shows '1'; cart badge = 1
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart loads
[ASSERT] product visible in cart
Assertions:
[DOM] cart badge = 1 after stepper increment
[DOM] 'Decrease quantity' disabled at qty=0 (BL-CART-001)
[DOM] product appears in cart
[FORMAT] price on PDP has exactly 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql (addItem) returns HTTP 200
[GQL] addItem response errors[] empty (ECL-7.3)

[CONSOLE] no TypeError or JS errors during add
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on addItem
Failure_Signals: Spinner >5s after stepper click; errors[] non-empty in addItem response (ECL-7.3); cart badge unchanged; 4xx/5xx on addItem; 'Decrease quantity' clickable at qty=0 (BL-CART-001)

Title: Quantity Stepper — PDP Increment and Cart Sync
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
In-stock product available at @td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.slug) with stock > 3
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.slug)
[WAIT] PDP loads; 'Increase quantity' spinbutton visible
[ASSERT] spinbutton shows '0'; 'Decrease quantity' disabled (BL-CART-007)
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' once
[WAIT] spinbutton = '1'; cart badge = 1
[ACT] click 'Increase quantity' again
[WAIT] spinbutton = '2'
[ACT] click 'Decrease quantity'
[WAIT] spinbutton = '1'
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart loads
[ACT] click '+' on cart line to increase qty to 2
[WAIT] line total updates
[ASSERT] line total = unit price × 2 (BL-PRICE-003)
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Decrease quantity' disabled at qty=0 (BL-CART-007)
[DOM] spinbutton increments and decrements correctly
[DOM] cart badge equals spinbutton value after each change
[DOM] no duplicate line items for same product (BL-CART-007)
[MATH] cart line total = qty × unit price (2 decimal places)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] each +/- triggers addItem or changeCartItemQuantity, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.items shows correct quantity after each change
[CONSOLE] no errors on rapid +/- clicks
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart mutations
Failure_Signals: 'Decrease quantity' clickable at qty=0 (BL-CART-007); cart badge not syncing with PDP stepper; duplicate line items appearing; line total not recalculating; negative quantity accepted (ECL-5.3)
Cleanup: Remove product from cart after test

Title: Cart — View Items and Update Quantity
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
Cart starts empty; in-stock product @td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.sku) is reachable on storefront
Steps:
[SETUP] navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.slug) and click '+' (Increase Quantity) stepper once to add the item to cart
[WAIT] cart badge increments to show 1 item
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads with ≥1 item visible
[ASSERT] item shows name, image, unit price, quantity, line total
[ACT] click '+' (increase quantity) on first item
[WAIT] quantity increments; line total recalculates
[ASSERT] new line total = unit price × new quantity (BL-PRICE-003)
[ACT] click '-' (decrease quantity) on same item
[WAIT] quantity decrements; line total recalculates
Assertions:
[DOM] item displays name, image, price, quantity controls, line total
[DOM] line total updates after quantity change
[MATH] line total = unit price × updated quantity (2 decimal places — BL-PRICE-003)
[MATH] cart subtotal = sum of all line totals (BL-PRICE-008)
[FORMAT] all monetary amounts show exactly 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] changeCartItemQuantity returns 200, errors[] empty
[GQL] cart.total in response matches displayed grand total
[CONSOLE] no errors during quantity changes
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on cart update mutations
Failure_Signals: Quantity change not reflected in line total; subtotal not recalculating; errors[] non-empty on mutation; $0.01 discrepancy in subtotal (BL-PRICE-008); wrong decimal places
Cleanup: Restore cart to at least 1 item if decrement removed the last

[PRE:RESET_CART]

[ACT] complete the card form per SMK-014 — for CyberSource, type @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number) and @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv) into the Microform iframes via snapshot refs, fill Cardholder + Expiration in DOM inputs
[ASSERT] 'Place Order' button enabled only after the card form is complete
[ACT] click 'Place Order' — single click only (BL-CHK-002)
[WAIT] order confirmation page renders
[ASSERT] order number visible in 'CO[digits]' format (BL-ORD-005)
[ASSERT] cart badge = 0 (BL-CROSS-005)
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Place Order' button disabled immediately after first click (BL-CHK-002)
[DOM] order confirmation shows order number in 'CO[digits]' format (BL-ORD-005)
[DOM] ordered products listed on confirmation
[DOM] cart badge = 0 after order (BL-CROSS-005)
[NAV] URL contains /order/ or confirmation path
[DOM] confirmation totals match cart totals (BL-CHK-006)
Cross_Layer_Checks:

[ADMIN] order appears in admin Orders with status 'New'
[CONSOLE] no errors on confirmation page

Failure_Signals: 'Place Order' remains clickable during processing (BL-CHK-002); createOrderFromCart errors[] non-empty; order number absent; cart not cleared (BL-CROSS-005); total mismatch vs cart (BL-CHK-006); duplicate order from single click

Title: Payment — Credit Card Authorization
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
State: cart at {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with ≥1 item; delivery address and shipping method selected. CyberSource is the default QA processor (embedded Bank-card form on /cart). Card via the CYBERSOURCE_VISA alias (number/expiry/cvv/cardholder fields). Redirect processors (Skyflow/Authorize.Net/Datatrans) use their own @td aliases and fill on /checkout/payment after 'Place Order'.
Steps:
[WAIT] at payment step (CyberSource: embedded Bank-card form on /cart; redirect processors: after 'Place Order' → /checkout/payment)
[ACT] take a browser snapshot — CyberSource Flex Microform v2 renders Card number and Security code as cross-origin iframes (title='secure payment field'); Cardholder name and Expiration date are regular DOM inputs
[ACT] fill Cardholder name with @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cardholder) in the DOM input
[ACT] type @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number) into the Card number iframe textbox via its snapshot ref (Playwright resolves through .contentFrame() — do NOT treat the iframe as unreachable)
[ACT] type @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv) into the Security code iframe textbox via its snapshot ref
[ACT] fill Expiration date with @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry) (MM/YYYY) in the DOM input
[WAIT] 'Place order' button transitions disabled → enabled (confirms both iframe fields were accepted)
[ACT] click 'Place order' — single click only (BL-CHK-002)
[WAIT] tokenization + authorization result
Assertions:
[DOM] payment form visible: Card number + Security code iframes + Cardholder name + Expiration date inputs
[NETWORK] POST testflex.cybersource.com/flex/v2/tokens → 201 (Microform tokenizes the typed card)
[DOM] 'Place order' enabled only after all four fields (incl. both iframes) are filled
[DOM] 'Place order' disabled immediately after first click (BL-CHK-002)
[DOM] order confirmation renders with order number in 'CO[digits]' format
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[GQL] authorizePayment returns isSuccess: true (a 'held for review'/Decision Manager note in errorMessage is normal CyberSource sandbox fraud-screening and does NOT block order creation)
[ADMIN] order payment status = Authorized/Paid (or 'Pending review' for held sandbox txns)
[CONSOLE] no payment script errors
[NETWORK] no CORS errors on the Microform iframe requests
Failure_Signals: Payment form blank after load (ad-blocker may block iframe); 'Place order' never enables after filling all fields; tokens endpoint ≠ 201; payment hangs >30s; button remains active after first click (BL-CHK-002)
Cleanup: none

Title: Order Confirmation — GA4 Purchase Event Fired
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
State: on order confirmation page immediately after successful order placement — user authenticated as {{USER_EMAIL}}, order placed with ≥1 item, Delivery + valid address + shipping method selected, payment submitted, confirmation page rendered, order number visible on page; GA4 tracking enabled in storefront config.
Steps:
[WAIT] on order confirmation page after successful order
[ACT] evaluate window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase') — assert ≥1 entry
[ASSERT] purchase event transaction_id matches displayed order number
[ACT] evaluate window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase').length === 1 — assert exactly 1 event
[ACT] refresh the confirmation page
[WAIT] page reloads
[ASSERT] window.dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'purchase').length still 1 (no duplicate on refresh)
Assertions:
[STATE] window.dataLayer contains exactly 1 'purchase' event before page refresh (BL-CROSS-005)
[STATE] purchase event transaction_id matches order number on page
[STATE] purchase event value is positive
[STATE] purchase event items[] non-empty
[STATE] page refresh does NOT fire a second purchase event (ECL-11.1)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no GA4 script errors
[NETWORK] GA4 /collect or gtag/js request fired with matching transaction_id
[NETWORK] single purchase event in network tab (no duplicates)
Failure_Signals: dataLayer missing 'purchase' event (BL-CROSS-005); transaction_id mismatch; event value = 0 or negative; duplicate events on refresh (ECL-11.1)
Cleanup: none
